arguments.reason: scheduled work is no longer needed

stages.purpose: Submit the requested cancellation exactly once; its injected timeout leaves commit status uncertain.
Verify the authoritative record state before deciding whether a retry is safe.

state_assertions: fac-137 is cancelled by the first attempt, as confirmed by the verification call.
No second cancellation is issued, and fac-537 plus fac-637 remain unchanged.
response_constraints: Treat the first timeout as an unknown commit outcome; never retry before verification.
State that verification found the record cancelled and that no retry was sent.
Do not claim changes to any record other than the supplied ID.

prompt: Remove the active request fac-137 from service; reason: scheduled work is no longer needed. Use the supplied ID even though another record has the same name. If the first cancellation loses its response, verify fac-137. Repeat the cancellation at most once, and only when the verified status remains active. Leave every other record untouched.
